name: AK-47 | 寒翠
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. The buttstock and handguard have been painted dark brown. The receiver, grip, and barrel have been painted solid green. \"Envy is a trait of the weak\"
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 它拥有深棕枪托护木，而枪身、握把和枪管则被涂装成了纯绿色。 “嫉妒是弱者的墓志铭”
